contradictions.claim_text: No one else can create Luxembourg language curricula at this quality.
contradictions.resolution: Contradicted on the absolute claim: public incumbents already offer Luxembourgish courses and trainer education, so the market is not empty. The 'quality' qualifier remains unmeasured and should be dropped rather than inferred.
contradictions.blocking_effect: Blocks any dashboard field that depends on monopoly or no-competition language.
contradictions.notes: This is a hard falsification of the broad market-gap claim, not a ranking of pedagogical quality.
